metadata.description: On Coolors, generate a 5-color palette, lock one color and adjust it to #FF6B6B, then export the palette to PDF.

instruction: On Coolors, generate a 5-color palette, lock one color and adjust it to #FF6B6B, then export the palette to PDF.
